title: athyrium okudairae
intro: Athyrium okudairae, also known as Okudairae fern, is a species of fern native to Japan. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium okudairae include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Athyrium okudairae is often combined with other plants to create infusions and decoctions for treating various ailments.
